reviews.name: places/ChIJZ53WjzTN1CsRxzLKELm-Nd0/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xoNFNIVnpjMnhSUTJneGNVcDBUWGt3ZW1zMWFIYxAB
reviews.text:
When a place has nearly 300 reviews and still holds a perfect five-star rating, that is not luck. That is consistency. And after my visit, I can confirm the streak is alive and well.

I sat down with Kelly and proceeded to ask roughly 47,000 questions over the course of about an hour. Testosterone therapy, peptides, weight loss options, overall health optimization. If it had anything to do with men’s health, I asked it. Rapid fire. Curiosity mode fully activated.

Kelly handled it like a seasoned pro. Patient, knowledgeable, and never once made me feel rushed or like I was asking too much. The level of patience on display could rival a kindergarten teacher on espresso or Mother Teresa on a really good day. Every answer was clear, thorough, and honest. No pressure. No awkward sales pitch. Just straight information so you can make smart decisions about your own health. Not to mention the fact that the several patients that came through, she greeted them all by name without having to check her calendar or appointment book.

If you are trying to figure out whether testosterone therapy is right for you, curious about peptides but have no clue what they actually are, exploring ED treatment, or looking into medically guided weight loss, this is a fantastic place to start. Yes, you can absolutely talk to your primary care physician about these topics. But sometimes a specialist who focuses on this every single day is exactly what you want. When it comes to your health, expertise matters.
Happy Wednesday
The environment was professional, welcoming, and efficient. You walk in feeling like you are getting real answers instead of vague maybes. You walk out feeling informed and empowered instead of confused.
If you have questions about men’s health and want real, knowledgeable guidance without pressure, Gameday Men’s Health is a no-brainer. Highly recommend.

reviews.text: I have been trying to find help for my 15 year old that didn’t involve medication to band aid his issue—I wanted to find the root cause. While he did have a diagnosis of EOE from mainstream medical, they weren’t any help in looking for the trigger food and offered little hope that I would find it. One conversation with Jenn and her expertise had me convinced that with effort and patience we could heal his gut and isolate the offending food eventually. Her protocol worked so well that we discovered the food on the first try! We are grateful for her intervention and insight into gut health. She brings a unique set of skills and knowledge having worked in conventional medicine. I can’t recommend her enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJh0nriLr7FUcR4vlfnVRRork/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25sRVNIZHRNRkpuZGxoSVMxTmZaRzFGUjBneVRXYxAB
reviews.text:
I’m not even sure where to begin to tell you how grateful our family is for Jenn. I came to her 6 months ago exhausted and heartbroken over my two year old’s eczema. She was miserable and I was too because nothing I tried made it better. Her entire body was inflamed— large swollen lymph nodes, red, itchy and her skin peeling off. She lost a ton of hair and just looked so sick. It was awful watching her itch herself until she would bleed. Doctors prescribed steroids which did not help long term and eventually said the dupixent injection was her only option. That did not sit right with me and I decided to search for someone who would dig deeper and help me figure out what was really going on with my daughter.

As a parent of a child with eczema you will spend money on anything that promises to help. I can’t tell you how many creams and lotions we’ve gone through. Eczema is so much deeper than applying topicals. You need internal healing. Jenn has extensive knowledge on this subject and knows just what tests to order. She interprets complex lab results and relays them in a manner that makes sense. She is thorough in her explanations and plan. We have made so much progress in 6 months. I hardly recognize my daughter. I am in tears as I type this— her skin is no longer red, her itching is gone and her skin is baby soft as it should be!

You will not regret bringing your child to Jenn. She is the only provider I have seen who has been willing to get in the trenches with me to help me figure out what is going on with my child. Jenn has been so compassionate and responsive during this whole process. Thank you Jenn!

reviews.name: places/ChIJh0nriLr7FUcR4vlfnVRRork/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21JMWFITlZlbTFYZWpSdVZVTnBkUzExVVVoUVNXYxAB
reviews.text: Jenn Devillenue, Functional Medicine Nurse Practitioner, has been absolutely instrumental in my son’s healing journey. For the first time ever, we have a health care provider who has looked for and has found root causes to what has been driving health issues my son has experienced his entire life. No other doctor has even come close to finding the answers she has found. It is such a relief to see him feeling so much better as a result!  I am so deeply grateful for Jenn Devillenue and her experience, excellence in expertise, compassion and her commitment to true health and total wellbeing. As a mom it comes as a great relief to have found her and I recommend her as a functional medicine practitioner to everyone I can. Sincerely, Laura DiFatta

reviews.text: So far, I've had 2 appointments here to try to get relief from my lower back pain. I have an L4/L5 herniation as well as mod-severe stenosis according to MRI. My goal is to avoid surgery, and get my life back. Dr. Erikson and all of the ladies I have encountered have been top notch in professionalism and courtesy. There is an efficiency here that I've never witnessed to this degree in a medical office. You can tell that Dr. Erikson is passionate about what he does and is a perfectionist. He was very thorough during the initial evaluation, and explained everything in perfect detail. I've never waited more than a few seconds, and have been checked on frequently during treatments. I am doing a combination of electromagnetic therapy, DRX9000 spinal traction, laser therapy, tens/heat therapy, hydromassage, very gentle chiropractic adjustments, and laser therapy. After my first 2 visits I've noticed significantly less pain and ability to tolerate activity has improved. I was even able to stand up and cook Thanksgiving dinner last week for much longer than I would've been able to stand before. I feel like the pricing is very reasonable for all of the cutting edge treatments that you receive. They do accept insurance, but the only part that mine covers is the adjustments and office visit. Most places I researched online charge for one course of treatment the same as I'm paying collectively for all of these. So far, this looks promising and I hope to continue seeing these positive results.

reviews.text: Mrs. Jana is extremely professional and so very understanding about what is going on with you and your needs to get better.  The more you explain to her about what is going on with you, the better the solution she has for you! I'm only ending my 1st month with hormone replacement therapy and I'm so excited for it all to actually affect my body to where I feel it! She's so very kind and beautiful and understands how very many things affect our body and hormones! Thank you Jana and your team!

reviews.name: places/ChIJGfYvecYTYogRJLg8apnUR7w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25Vek9FUkxRVzAxVTA1dE1WcEVXVVE0VEdOVU5VRRAB
reviews.text: I found Jana via my sister. We set up an appt for hormone therapy. I was nervous of course. Have been going thru menopause and feeling terrible. Offered me so many options of help. Even after our appt she text back and forth with me because I had a few more questions. First time I've had hope that I will get back to "me" very soon with her help. I wish that I had reached out to her sooner. Ladies, don't go thru hormones stress alone! There is help here with someone that genuinely cares about women.

reviews.name: places/ChIJUwsbkKATYogRcjsUMtxQv4w/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xZM1NHZHRWemh6YmtGa1pXZDJSVWcwUW0xQ2JrRRAB
reviews.text: I have done business in the past and had mix results with the service provided. But decided to take a chance on this company a second time in hopes that it had gotten better and paid cash upfront for a one year term. I then had decided to take a different route and didn’t even start or receive the medication before I requested a refund. Caleb said it would be no problem. He did mention this process could take a few weeks and stayed in touch pretty often in the first week or two then stopped reaching out. Last thing I heard from him was him mentioning that his upper management wanted to do a 0% refund which I am not entirely sure exactly how that is a refund when I haven’t even started treatment before requesting a refund within a week of payment for the service. Nonetheless he did mention this could take a few weeks which I was fine with but I am now at the 6 week mark and have not heard anything from anyone other than the front desk receptionist when I call to ask for an update or to speak with someone about the situation on the refund. I usually get “Caleb will reach out to you when he’s available.” Which is no problem but he hasn’t reached out is the issue. Last update I received from the front desk receptionist was another person was supposed to reach out soon (next business day) on the next steps and that was a week ago and still have not heard anything. While this place does offer treatment for what you’re possibly looking for. They are a bit more expensive price wise and offer less kinds of medication in my experience and would definitely seek around Huntsville before committing with this clinic. With that said, the only reason I am giving a two star review instead of one is because the nurses, doctors, and front desk receptionists at the facility have been nice and very resourceful. Make sure that you are 100% on wanting to do business with them and confirm that the medication they offer is what you want to do because if it isn’t. You will be in the same situation as me waiting on a refund if I even get one at this stage.

reviews.text: Excellent concept, care, and highly individualized approach to the complexities of women’s healthcare. Very satisfying to have someone whom I trust and who never stops trying to unravel and parse through multiple health issues.

reviews.name: places/ChIJT8jzWWsTYogRJ1WwQMhfGSs/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURJanVuc0lnEAE
reviews.text: For about 2 yrs after having my daughter, I had been experiencing extreme fatigue, anxiety, depression, poor sleep and irregular cycles.  These symptoms were excerbated after having just moved across country to the Huntsville area with my toddler. I knew something was off and saught a provider that would investigate the root cause and take a holistic approach. I'm so grateful I found Adrienne and Cove Telehealth. The  first consult and treatment plan were extremely informative and accessible via Telehealth. I can't express enough the relief and validation I felt after Adrienne listened to what I was experiencing and made it easy to understand the plan and what she suspected was going on. She was thorough in testing to make sure we were on the right path and I felt so comfortable with her informed approach. She and her team were so reliable and responsive throughout my care journey. Now, I am such a different person a year later after starting HRT which restored my energy, confidence, sleep and sanity and I owe it to this amazing team! Can't recommend them enough!

reviews.text: Cove Telehealth for Women truly changed my life. I have worked with Adrienne for over a year and I have never felt better. I’ve never been to a doctor’s appointment where I felt more seen and heard.

reviews.text: I've been going to Madison Wellness for 2 years now and I can't say enough about how they have improved my quality of life. This past December I used their VIP line to let them know my pellets had worn off and how incredibly miserable I was feeling. Each day was such a struggle for me and I was feeling all the menopause symptoms times 10 and just barely making it through each day and it was affecting my husband too and our relationship. Thankfully Amanda responded back quickly to my text and got me in for blood work that afternoon and a couple days later for pellet insertion. She showed so much compassion and I am forever grateful for her helping me in my time of need! I'm back on track now and feeling like a brand new person. Thanks Amanda and everyone at Madison Wellness. You're amazing 💕

All the other doctors made me feel crazy or there was nothing wrong with me , I wasn’t on right diet or getting enough sleep… they were giving me every excuse you could think of and I knew none of that was correct . I knew something was wrong with me , I wasn’t crazy. When I was recommended to him , I didn’t have high hope or that he would do anything differently but I said why not try him out … That day was the best day of my life in a long time because he listened to ME!!!! He actually listened and after some testing was able to diagnose me and change my life!!!! I still have some bad days but most days are great everyday and I owe that to Dr. Fondren and his team!!!! They are the real deal……They actually care about you… They actually listen to you . They take pride in each and every patient they have…They do not  just toss you to someone else to deal with … Then Dr Fondren takes his time with your visit.. He listens and addresses each and every concern you have with no rushing you at all… he will take all the time that you might need!!!! He has amazing bedside manners as my granny would say .. He just makes you feel that he cares and not just another patient to get in and out … Actually I have to rush him along on some days when I’m in a rush because he just wants to be thorough and I love him for that!!! He doesn’t just see us as Dollar signs…He sees us as the people we are, he sees us as his patients that he cares for !!!!  I could go on for days because I feel like he saved my life , and I would recommend him and his team over and over again.. Thank you Dr.Fondren for bringing me back to life ☺️

reviews.text:

reviews.text:
I’ve been on TRT since leaving the military, the VA doesn’t treat this very effectively. Never doing full labs and always trying to add prescription meds to the list. So I’ve had to use external resources.

So far Renew Vitality is on of the few that runs complete labs and provides a custom treatment plan to your needs.

My rep Bill has been awesome, he knows the process and treatments inside and out. He Is very knowledgeable. Most importantly for me is he maintains consistent communication and touches base before labs or anything so I don’t forget. Amazing customer service and always sends some free samples.

Only reason I didn’t give 5 stars is the treatment is a bit pricey. But seems to be the cost for thorough treatment.
